# 知识图谱方法论

知识图谱方法论 is a core concept in education and knowledge management. Closely related to [[obsidian-app]], [[zettelkasten]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
